3029370.name: The Gallo Presidency - Prologue
3029370.description:
The Gallo Presidency

An hour long introductory prologue to an intense political story that you get to experience as a visual novel.

Take a role in a political campaign and make important decisions as you try to shock the world by winning the Presidential Election.
Defeat the Republican Party and Democratic Party as you elevate your role in an Independent campaign.

President William Tomar of the Democratic Party is not popular with voters. The Republicans are also struggling to gain support. This sets up the perfect opportunity for Jessimae Gallo, an Independent candidate for President, to take down the two-party political system and become the first officially elected female President in America's history.

  • Can you support her efforts and make the right choices to bring in campaign donors?
  • Can you appeal to voters and work with campaign advisors to boost campaign support?
  • If called upon, can you take on an unexpected high-ranking public role?
